headline: Smart Pause for motion wallpapers
summary: Canvas can now pause motion wallpaper decoding when another app is full screen, the Mac is under heavy CPU load, or Low Power Mode is enabled.

features.title: Pause behind full-screen apps
features.description: Canvas automatically pauses motion wallpapers while another application occupies a full screen, then resumes afterward.

features.title: Configurable CPU protection
features.description: Choose a 50–95% system CPU threshold. Sustained load pauses playback and built-in hysteresis prevents rapid toggling.

features.title: Low Power Mode aware
features.description: Motion wallpapers can stop decoding while Low Power Mode is active, while still-image wallpapers remain unaffected.
